notes: Exam/presentation week. Very active day (15,702 steps). New weight low: 76.0kg. No dinner. 7-day sleep avg 7h27m.

sleep.notes: 6h2m. Onset ~10PM — excellent anchor (4th consecutive night near 10-11PM). Deep sleep in first block (~10PM-12AM). Blocks 2 & 3 Core+REM with stress-driven awakenings from ~2AM onwards. 7-day avg 7h27m per Apple Health.
